stemHtml: General provisions – change from IFR to VFR – A change from IFR to VFR is only acceptable when VFR is permitted in that airspace and when?

options.a: ATC invites the PIC to change from IFR to VFR.
options.b: the PIC has requested and obtained an ATC clearance for the change and has filed an ATS flight plan for a special VFR flight.
options.c: the change is initiated by the PIC with a message containing the specific expression “cancel IFR flight”.
options.d: the position of the change has been noted on the ATC flight plan. The cancellation of the flight under IFR will then be made automatically by ATC.
